Description: Full-service TA travel center at I-40 Exit 37 (Wiggins Rd), open 24/7. 106 truck parking spots (38 reservable), 8 diesel fuel lanes, 8 showers, restaurant/deli, convenience store, laundry, CAT scale, bulk DEF, and TA Truck Service shop with 4 bays offering tire repair, oil/lube, DOT inspections and truck repairs (truck service: 828-641-9658). Confirmed operating post-Hurricane Helene (reviews through mid-2026).

Certified CAT scale located at the TA Candler travel center, I-40 Exit 37, open 24 hours with the truck stop. The only verified CAT scale on I-40 between Canton and Old Fort in the Asheville metro segment.

Independent heavy-duty truck and trailer repair shop at I-40 Exit 37 in Candler, serving western NC since 2016. Fixed shop location (not mobile-only) offering diesel engine repair, commercial truck tire installation and repair, hydraulic hose repair, and RV/heavy equipment work. First-come, first-served; open weekdays with extended evening hours, closed weekends. Operating post-Hurricane Helene (reviews through 2026).

Freightliner dealership with fixed full-service truck repair, parts and maintenance facility in the Enka-Candler commerce area off Smokey Park Hwy (US 19/23), near I-40 Exit 44. Parts and service departments open 7 days a week; handles routine maintenance through major semi-truck repairs plus new/used truck sales.

84-room motel just off I-40 Exit 65 (US 70), two blocks from downtown Black Mountain. Explicitly advertises plenty of free lot parking for trucks and RVs and is listed on Trucker Path as a truck-friendly hotel with RV/bus/truck parking. Free breakfast, free WiFi, laundry facilities, 24-hour front desk. Operating post-Hurricane Helene (2026 reviews/rates active).

57-room Choice Hotels property just off I-40 Exit 64 (NC 9) in Black Mountain. Multiple booking listings explicitly note on-site RV, bus, and truck parking. Free hot breakfast, free WiFi, seasonal outdoor pool, guest laundry. Operating post-Hurricane Helene (2026 reviews/rates active).

Business Name: Asheville Weigh Station (NC State Highway Patrol)
Address: I-40 eastbound and westbound, approx. 12 miles west of Asheville (Buncombe County)
Description: NCSHP-operated weigh station with two fixed scales on I-40 in Buncombe County (between exits 37 and 44, near Candler). HELD: official NCSHP/NCDPS listings confirm the station and phone number but publish no civic street address; the '410 I-40, Candler' / 'Mile Marker 41' addresses circulating online appear only on unofficial directories.

Business Name: Truck Parking Club - 1464 Brevard Rd lot
Description: Bookable truck/trailer parking lot on Brevard Rd (NC 191) listed on Truck Parking Club: approx. 14-15 spaces, $15/day, $85/week, $250/month, 5.0-star member rating. HELD: single-source (Truck Parking Club marketplace only); 1464 Brevard Rd sits on the NC 191 corridor between I-40 Exit 47 and I-26 Exit 33, so I-40 exit assignment is unverified.

Business Name: Truck Parking Club - Candler lot off Smokey Park Hwy
Address: Smokey Park Hwy (exact street number not published in listing preview)
Description: Bookable truck/trailer parking off Smokey Park Hwy (US 19/23) in Candler listed on Truck Parking Club: $17/day, $75/week, $200/month, no low-boys, 5.0-star member rating; a second Candler listing shows 10 spaces at $15/day. HELD: single-source (Truck Parking Club marketplace only) and full street address not exposed without booking; Smokey Park Hwy corridor is served by I-40 exits 37 and 44.

Business Name: Comfort Inn Asheville East-Blue Ridge Pkwy Access
Description: Choice Hotels property on Tunnel Rd (US 70) at I-40 Exit 55 in east Asheville. Trucker-reported parking arrangement: large vehicles, tractor-trailers and trailers park across the street in the vacant lot east of the Waffle House, per crowd-sourced HotelTruckParking reports. HELD: truck-parking confirmation is a single crowd-sourced report describing off-site (not hotel-controlled) parking, and listed phone numbers conflict across sources.

Tire dealer and service center in West Asheville advertising 24/7 semi-truck roadside assistance (tire repair, fuel delivery) plus fleet services; Michelin/BFGoodrich commercial dealer. HELD: shop sits on Emma Rd roughly 2+ miles from I-40 Exit 44 via Patton Ave, not at an I-40 interchange, and published phone numbers conflict across sources (828-255-8200 vs 828-348-5093).

Full-service Pilot truck stop at I-40 Exit 24 (US 209/Crabtree Rd), the only major truck stop between the Tennessee line and Canton. Approximately 60 truck parking spaces (8 reserved/paid), 6-7 diesel lanes, 4 showers, CAT scale, Subway and pizza on site, DEF, Wi-Fi. Westernmost full truck stop on I-40 in NC; note one-lane-each-way conditions continue west of Exit 7 through the Pigeon River Gorge during Helene reconstruction (full lanes targeted for 2028).
CAT scale located at the Pilot Travel Center at I-40 Exit 24 (US 209). Only verified CAT scale between the Tennessee line and Exit 37.

Fixed-location truck repair shop at the TA travel center, I-40 Exit 37. Four service bays handling tires, brakes, electrical, DOT inspections, advanced diagnostics, HVAC, alignments, trailers, and aftertreatment; RoadSquad roadside assistance is dispatched from this fixed facility.

Business Name: North Carolina Welcome Center - I-40 West (Haywood County)
Description: Official state welcome center on I-40 eastbound at mile marker 10 in Haywood County, the first NC facility for traffic entering from Tennessee. Restrooms, motorcoach/RV and truck-accessible parking, vending, picnic tables, and visitor information (building staffed 8 a.m.-5 p.m. daily; remodeled 2020). Located just east of the Pigeon River Gorge reconstruction zone; verify access during ongoing Helene rebuild, with full gorge lanes targeted for 2028.

Business Name: Pilot Flying J Truck Care Service Center - Waynesville

Description: Commercial tire dealer and fleet service center in Hickory serving the I-40 corridor. Commercial truck tires, trailer repair, truck repair, retreads, and 24-hour emergency roadside dispatch from a fixed shop location.

Business Name: Piedmont Truck Tires Inc. (McCarthy Tire Service)
Description: Commercial truck tire shop in Conover near the I-40 Hickory/Conover corridor, powered by McCarthy Tire Service. Bridgestone/Firestone commercial dealer servicing trucks, trailers, buses, OTR and farm equipment, with 24/7 commercial roadside assistance dispatched through McCarthy's national line.

Full-service commercial truck dealership (formerly Advantage Truck Center) near the I-40 Conover exits. Volvo, Mack, Autocar, Isuzu and Hino sales with heavy-duty parts and service for all makes from a fixed facility. Mon-Fri 7am-7pm.

Mack, Volvo, Hino and Isuzu dealer and all-makes heavy truck repair shop serving the Hickory market, reached from I-40 Exit 128 (Fairgrove Church Rd) per the dealership's own directions. OEM parts, Cummins engine repair, Allison transmission support, trailer service and mobile maintenance from a fixed facility.

Full-service hotel at I-40 Exit 125 (Lenoir Rhyne Blvd). IHG's official amenity listing states complimentary and ample parking for large vehicles, tour buses, trailers and tractor-trailers (registered guests only). On-site restaurant.

Business Name: Days Inn & Suites by Wyndham Hickory
Description: Budget hotel off US-321 north of I-40 Exit 123 in Hickory. Wyndham's official property page advertises ample bus, truck, and RV parking. Phone omitted pending verification (conflicting numbers in directories).
